structure.title: JoyzAI - Custom AI Chatbot Platform
structure.summary: Deploy a custom AI chatbot that delivers short, accurate answers instantly and gets smarter with every interaction.

nodes.title: What is JoyzAI Custom AI Chatbot?
nodes.summary: You're probably stuck in the following situations: - Your inbox is flooded with customer queries - You're still using boring Google Forms to capture your leads - Your agents are spending a majority of their time on irrelevant queries - You're losing leads because your team cannot be available during non-working hours

nodes.title: Enter JoyzAI, a custom AI chatbot
nodes.summary: Here's what it can do: - Handle unlimited customer queries, 24x7 - Deliver expert-level answers on your business - Deploy on Website, WhatsApp, Instagram, and more - Multilingual, accurate, personalized answers - Human-like responses with real-time resolution

nodes.title: How Our Custom AI Chatbot Helps Business
nodes.summary: Built to reduce workload, improve response time, and scale support effortlessly.

nodes.title: Always-On Customer Support
nodes.summary: - Handles high volumes of queries 24/7 - Eliminates wait times and missed leads - Frees human agents for complex issues

nodes.title: Multilingual Conversations
nodes.summary: - Automatically detects customer language - Responds fluently and naturally - Improves global customer experience

nodes.title: Action-Driven AI Workflows
nodes.summary: - Understands real customer intent - Connects with your internal systems - Executes tasks, not just answers questions

nodes.title: Scale Without Expanding Your Team
nodes.summary: - Manages growing query volumes effortlessly - Reduces dependency on manual support - Maintains consistent service quality

nodes.title: Instant, No-Code Deployment
nodes.summary: - No APIs or technical setup required - Add your business information - Go live within minutes

nodes.title: Continuous Learning & Improvement
nodes.summary: - Centralized conversation dashboard - Identify answered and unanswered queries - Train the AI to improve future responses

nodes.title: Discover the Platform
nodes.summary: Smart features designed right for you:

nodes.title: Instant AI Replies
nodes.summary: Gets the query, searches your data, and gives accurate answers - instantly.

nodes.title: Intent-Based Workflows
nodes.summary: Detects the intent of the user and completes the tasks using APIs.

nodes.title: Unanswered Questions
nodes.summary: Automate 80% of your queries by adding the answers as you go.

nodes.title: Multi-channel Integrations
nodes.summary: One chatbot that works across your Website, WhatsApp, and Apps.

nodes.title: Why Choose JoyzAI?
nodes.summary: There are so many support chatbots available in the market. Why us?

nodes.title: 24/7 Live AI Assistant
nodes.summary: Replies instantly to incoming WhatsApp messages, even after business hours. Your business stays active 24/7 with an AI agent.

nodes.title: Multilingual Support
nodes.summary: The AI chatbot understands the user's language and responds fluently. Perfect for businesses serving customers in multiple languages.

nodes.title: Cost Savings
nodes.summary: Automates up to 80% of your support queries and repetitive tasks. Allows you to operate with smaller teams and low operational costs.

nodes.title: Works Across Multiple Channels
nodes.summary: Use the same chatbot across your website, WhatsApp, and apps. Give consistent, AI-powered responses on all channels managed from a single dashboard.

nodes.title: A Chatbot That Improves Over Time
nodes.summary: Track answered and unanswered requests in real time. Train the chatbot for all similar queries in the future.

nodes.title: Workflows to Automate Your Repetitive Tasks
nodes.summary: Let AI understand the intent behind any user query. Perform tasks on your behalf using APIs instead of escalating everything to you.

nodes.title: Improved Customer Experience
nodes.summary: Provides human-like responses and instant solutions. Your customers don't have to raise tickets or wait long to get their issues resolved.

nodes.title: Send Images, PDFs, and Videos Without Human Intervention
nodes.summary: Add the relevant images, PDFs, and Videos to your knowledge base. Let the AI send Brochures, Product Catalogs, PDFs, and more when your users ask.

nodes.title: Seamless Integration
nodes.summary: Seamlessly integrates with your Shopify or WooCommerce. Qualifies leads and sends them to your CRM or Google Sheet.

nodes.title: Launch in 5 Minutes
nodes.summary: Setting up your custom AI chatbot is now incredibly easy. No coding or APIs. Just Plug and Play. 1. Sign up - Go to http://app.joyz.ai/ and login using your Gmail account. 2. Train the chatbot - With information about your business added from your website, PDF, or manually. 3. Go Live - Go live by adding one line of code for website, signing up for WhatsApp API, or scanning a QR code for WhatsApp.

nodes.title: Industry-wise Use Cases
nodes.summary: Tailored solutions for your business:

nodes.title: E-commerce
nodes.summary: Enable orders via WhatsApp or website, answer product and delivery questions, and handle customer queries 24/7.

nodes.title: SaaS
nodes.summary: Let the chatbot share license details, manage subscriptions, and handle billing tasks.

nodes.title: Travel
nodes.summary: Provide live booking, hotel and trip details including confirmation and amenities.

nodes.title: Healthcare
nodes.summary: Answer common questions by patients. Schedule appointments, send reminders, and send prescriptions online.

nodes.title: Education
nodes.summary: Offer course details, registration, fee payment options, and resource access.

nodes.title: Logistics
nodes.summary: Automate order tracking with real-time updates, manage customer contact and delivery details. Finally, escalate to a human when needed.

nodes.title: Real Estate
nodes.summary: Automate property inquiries, pricing, and availability. Schedule visits, and qualify leads to send to your CRM.

nodes.title: Platforms Where You Can Use JoyzAI
nodes.summary: Seamlessly Integrate and automate across multiple platforms: - Website - Have your AI Agent provide live support over your website 24/7. - WhatsApp - Turn your mobile WhatsApp into a full-fledged AI chatbot that talks like you - WhatsApp API - Connect WhatsApp API, send campaigns, and let JoyzAI handle interested customer queries. - Applications - Train JoyzAI and offer in-app support so customers get help without leaving.

nodes.title: FAQ
nodes.summary: FAQ

nodes.title: What is the main purpose of an AI chatbot?
nodes.summary: The main purpose of this AI chatbot is to automate all the repetitive queries and customer support, improving customer engagement, and delivering real-time assistance to your customers.

nodes.title: How to create my own AI chatbot?
nodes.summary: Creating a custom chatbot on JoyzAI is super easy—and you can go live in 5 minutes! Sign up at app.joyz.ai, train your AI chatbot, and go live.

nodes.title: How much does the AI chatbot cost?
nodes.summary: JoyzAI offers plans for businesses of all sizes. For every AI conversation, you pay a flat ₹7. All messages within a 24-hour window with one person is considered as one conversation.

nodes.title: Does JoyzAI support multiple languages?
nodes.summary: Yes! When the user asks a question, JoyzAI naturally detects the language of the user and responds in the same.

nodes.title: Can I train JoyzAI with my own business info?
nodes.summary: Of course. JoyzAI is a custom-built chatbot for your business. You can add info via Website URL, PDF upload, or manual entry. --- © Copyright 2025 Joyz Cloudtech Pvt Ltd - All Rights Reserved Contact: help@joyz.ai | +91-7526016050
